mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_seckill_session WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW()
SELECT * FROM biz_seckill_session WHERE status = 1 AND start_time > NOW() ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT * FROM biz_seckill_session WHERE show_id = #{showId} ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT * FROM biz_seckill_session WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT * FROM biz_seckill_session ORDER BY id ASC
